creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
As discussed on #bsdports, private mail and sahil@ MJBrune has requested that he pass maintainership to me; hence the label and class of this PR.

	Monitorx has suffered a total rewrite since 1.5.0, and hence the changelog is long [1].

[1] http://www.monitorix.org/changelog.html

Fix: - Update to 2.1.0
	- Pass maintainership to submitter
	- Rewrite rc script
Submitted by: Chris Rees (utisoft_at_gmail.com)


NB: I've forced command_interpreter to ".", since the script changes its procname once executed, greatly confusing rc.subr. I've tried many 'proper' ways to do it, but it seems the only way that works.
